authority_surfaces.summary: Earth reads the network as embodiment, practice, durability, and lived load-bearing form.
Earth reads the network as embodiment, practice, durability, and lived load-bearing form.
Earth reads the network as embodiment, practice, durability, and lived load-bearing form.
Earth reads the network as embodiment, practice, durability, and lived load-bearing form.
The local Earth zero point is `Z_earth.gate`.
`256^4` remains the compiled control field. `1024^6` remains an overlay-only higher lift.

- `SEALED`: route is locally admissible and has a deterministic return checkpoint. - `FILTERED`: route is useful but must stay bounded by local evidence and explicit guards. - `QUARANTINED`: route carries unresolved contradiction, alias drift, or illegal appendix pressure and may not propagate.
Earth is only legal if it can return to the current 4D witnesses without losing appendix legality, replay closure, contradiction containment, or the exact gate history required for `7D_SEED`.

- `AppA_addressing_and_grammars.md`: Addressing and grammars. - `AppB_canon_laws_and_forms.md`: Canon laws and forms. - `AppC_kernel_pack_and_mixing.md`: Kernel pack and mixing. - `AppD_registry_and_policies.md`: Registry and policies.

dimension_lift_chain.title: Containment Chambers
dimension_lift_chain.dimensional_role: Containment chambers and support surfaces that let the organism hold load without leakage.
dimension_lift_chain.visibility_gain: Names burden, quarantine, and support as explicit compartments.
dimension_lift_chain.needs_higher_dimension: Cannot yet expose full chapter-orbit routing or replay topology.

dimension_lift_chain.title: Tesseract Route Calculus
dimension_lift_chain.dimensional_role: Current tesseract v4 route calculus with chapter orbit, triangle rails, HCRL order, and typed tunnel plans.
dimension_lift_chain.visibility_gain: Stabilizes `521` live records as addressable atoms and route plans.
dimension_lift_chain.needs_higher_dimension: Cannot yet compress Earth contract families or downstream handoff law into one bundle.

dimension_lift_chain.title: Compressed Earth Contract Families
dimension_lift_chain.dimensional_role: Compresses the Earth pass into E1-E4 families: legality, activation release, flow banking, and proof-return.
dimension_lift_chain.visibility_gain: Groups chapter and appendix obligations into reusable contract families instead of isolated witnesses.
dimension_lift_chain.needs_higher_dimension: Still lacks the woven hologram that unifies chapter contracts, appendix contracts, and handoffs.

dimension_lift_chain.title: Earth Hologram Weave
dimension_lift_chain.dimensional_role: Woven Earth hologram of chapter contracts, appendix contracts, handoff rules, and regeneration seed.
dimension_lift_chain.visibility_gain: Makes the additive Earth lift explicit without rewriting the v4 substrate.
dimension_lift_chain.needs_higher_dimension: Requires the shared H6 convergence center and Seed-6D emission before any later neutral seed compilation.

handoff_contracts.rule: Fire receives only Earth-cleared activation outputs.
acceptance_criteria: activation is backed by route receipt and chapter contract

handoff_contracts.rule: Water receives only corridor-banked continuity outputs.
acceptance_criteria: flow leaves Earth only through AppI-banked continuity

handoff_contracts.rule: Air receives only schema-stable proof-and-return outputs.
acceptance_criteria: proof and replay hooks are present
return path is explicit before publication or abstraction

cohesion_ledger.precedence_rule: Use the live 14_DEEPER... deep root as authority; treat historical Earth passes as witness layers and family-local orchestrators as non-authoritative for whole-corpus routing.
cohesion_ledger.drift_policy: Record drift and precedence explicitly; do not delete historical surfaces in this pass.
cohesion_ledger.prune_policy: Prune by de-prioritization and classification, not destructive deletion.

regeneration_seed.title: Earth H6 Regeneration Seed
regeneration_seed.compression_law: Collapse every structural claim to mandatory signature, truth corridor, replay pointer, and chapter station before lifting again.
regeneration_seed.expansion_law: Re-expand only through E1-E4 bundle families so legality, activation, continuity, and proof-return stay coupled.
regeneration_seed.shortest_route: AppA -> AppI -> AppM -> chapter contract -> downstream handoff.
regeneration_seed.deepest_route: 3D containment -> 4D tesseract route calculus -> 5D Earth bundle families -> 6D Earth hologram weave.
regeneration_seed.zero_point_law: Every cross-context Earth route collapses through Z* before re-entry; no legality is inferred without a receipt.
regeneration_seed.dimensional_nesting_law: The 6D Earth layer contains the 5D families, which contain the 4D route calculus, which stabilizes the 3D chambers.
regeneration_seed.docs_gate_condition: Google Docs remain blocked; local witness surfaces are the only admissible evidence in this seed.
